opinion.h4: KOVRAK v. GINSBURG ET AL., MEMBERS OF THE COMMITTEE ON UNAUTHORIZED PRACTICE OF THE LAW. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA, EASTERN DISTRICT. No. 266. Decided October 20, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Filindo B. Masino and William B. Ball for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
